notes: The canonical source is the gated Hugging Face dataset TheFinAI/flare-edtsum.
The visible wrapper exposes a single test split with 2,000 examples and fields id, query, answer, and text.
ST312 treats the task as financial news headline generation / headline-style abstractive summarization rather than generic long-form summarization.
FinBen describes EDTSUM as manually selected and cleaned from Zhou et al. (2021).
The EDT source chain ultimately includes financial news and press-release text from PRNewswire, Businesswire, and GlobeNewswire.
Because the upstream access is gated and the deeper source chain is license-sensitive, public redistribution of the full article text is not treated as cleared.

hf_publish.upstream_license_note: The upstream dataset is gated, requires contact sharing and non-commercial-use agreement, and the deeper EDT source chain includes PRNewswire / Businesswire / GlobeNewswire text. This ST312 publication is therefore carried with an explicit upstream licensing and redistribution caution.
